exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your relationship breakup forward
items: Create a comprehensive inventory of all shared assets, debts, and accounts with your partner
Research and contact 3 family law attorneys in your area to understand your legal rights and options
Schedule individual therapy sessions with a licensed counselor specializing in relationship transitions
Document and understand the timeline of your relationship breakdown to identify key patterns and triggers
Gather and organize all important personal documents and establish your own financial accounts
Create a safe and supportive living arrangement plan for the immediate separation period
